validationRun.deletedPagePath: pages/“景德镇制”陶瓷保护条例__2024-04-03__有效__e5dad75ccd4a.md

testsRun: PostgreSQL, Redis, S3, and OKF white-box checks
lint, typecheck, unit tests, and build
validationPasses: Pass 1: bounded sample selection and redacted prerequisite validation.
Pass 2: real service API, public OpenAPI, persistence, storage, Redis, OKF, model-mode, and deletion validation.
Pass 3: Admin UI browser validation plus final repository verification and report leak scan.
manualReviewItems: Review optional sample coverage warnings to decide whether the configured local dataset should be broadened.
Review the Vite chunk size warning separately if frontend bundle size becomes a release concern.

checks.name: postgres-prerequisite
checks.message: PostgreSQL is reachable.

checks.name: redis-prerequisite
checks.message: Redis is reachable.

checks.name: s3-prerequisite
checks.message: S3-compatible storage accepts put and get operations.

checks.name: model-assistance-mode
checks.message: Model assistance is enabled with bounded context, timeout, and concurrency settings.

checks.name: admin-auth-required
checks.message: Admin API rejects unauthenticated knowledge base reads.

checks.name: public-openapi-prerequisite
checks.message: Public OpenAPI is reachable.

checks.name: http-security-headers
checks.message: Admin API and public OpenAPI return security response headers on validation responses.

checks.name: admin-login
checks.message: Admin login succeeded with configured credentials.

checks.name: public-openapi-managed-key
checks.message: Loaded one-time managed OpenAPI key from Admin API.

checks.name: knowledge-base-create
checks.message: Created validation knowledge base.

checks.name: single-upload-submit
checks.message: Uploaded one selected sample in a single-file upload action.

checks.name: single-task-ended
checks.message: Single-file upload task reached ended lifecycle state.

checks.name: single-task-detail
checks.message: Single-file task detail exposes bounded admin-only phase entries.

checks.name: single-upload-task-row
checks.message: Single-file upload is represented as one task row with one lifecycle status.

checks.name: single-admin-file-surfaces
checks.message: Admin release, bundle, tree, detail, and public URL surfaces work after single upload.

checks.name: okf-public-artifacts
checks.message: Public OKF Markdown, metadata indexes, headings, and graph links are internally consistent.

checks.name: single-public-openapi
checks.message: Public scoped Markdown, JSON, task, auth, source hiding, and error checks passed after single upload.

checks.name: single-database-boundaries
checks.message: PostgreSQL contains durable records, original file names, storage-backed keys, and no raw file body columns after single upload.

checks.name: single-s3-object-boundaries
checks.message: S3 contains internal source objects and generated public page objects without exposing source logical paths after single upload.

details.pageLogicalPath: pages/“景德镇制”陶瓷保护条例__2024-04-03__有效__e5dad75ccd4a.md

checks.name: batch-upload-submit
checks.message: Uploaded selected batch samples in one upload action.

checks.name: batch-task-ended
checks.message: Batch upload task reached ended lifecycle state.

checks.name: batch-task-detail
checks.message: Batch task detail exposes bounded admin-only phase entries.

checks.name: single-batch-upload-task-rows
checks.message: Single and batch upload actions are represented as two task rows with one lifecycle status each.

checks.name: task-source-pagination
checks.message: Task source files are paginated with an independent bounded cursor.

checks.name: batch-admin-file-surfaces
checks.message: Admin release, bundle, tree, detail, and public URL surfaces include single and batch generated files.

checks.name: okf-public-artifacts
checks.message: Public OKF Markdown, metadata indexes, headings, and graph links are internally consistent.

checks.name: batch-public-openapi
checks.message: Public scoped Markdown, JSON, task, auth, source hiding, and error checks passed after batch upload.

checks.name: batch-database-boundaries
checks.message: PostgreSQL contains durable records, original file names, storage-backed keys, and no raw file body columns after batch upload.

checks.name: batch-s3-object-boundaries
checks.message: S3 contains internal source objects and generated public page objects without exposing source logical paths after batch upload.

details.pageLogicalPath: pages/“景德镇制”陶瓷保护条例__2024-04-03__有效__e5dad75ccd4a.md

checks.name: redis-boundaries
checks.message: Redis scan did not find selected sample Markdown bodies in string values.

checks.name: source-page-delete-submit
checks.message: Submitted source-backed page deletion through the Admin API.

checks.name: task-ended
checks.message: Upload task reached ended lifecycle state.

checks.name: task-detail
checks.message: Task detail exposes bounded admin-only phase entries.

checks.name: deletion-database-boundaries
checks.message: PostgreSQL records source deletion, one ended deletion task, task phases, and a replacement active release.

checks.name: public-deletion-state
checks.message: Public OpenAPI and generated indexes reflect source-backed page deletion.
